name: community-survival-platform
description: Monorepo scaffold for the community-operated survival platform.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names gateway,sim,events,progress,op-api,admin -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white "npm run dev -w @game/gateway" "npm run dev -w @game/simulation" "npm run dev -w @game/event-log" "npm run dev -w @game/progression" "npm run dev -w @game/operator-api" "npm run dev -w @game/admin-web"
